generated_parts.label: Battery/Power Display Module
generated_parts.spec: Power_display battery_module dummy with access_panel, keyed connector label, service cover, mass budget note, no live energy system

requirements.description: Battery module dummy with access panel
requirements.spec: Power_display battery_module dummy with access_panel, keyed connector label, service cover, mass budget note, no live energy system
BOUNDARY: All subsystems are educational display mockups; no propulsion, ignition, or flight-performance design
[replaceable_module_path] good: Battery, sensor, actuator, cartridge, payload, cable, or joint modules remain removable without full teardown
[cable_harness_visibility] good: Harnesses, tubes, or service channels are routed through visible raceways or protected channels
[access_not_just_text] good: Access is represented by geometry: hatch, pocket, channel, fastener pattern, slot, window, or removable cover

[harness_strain_relief_and_bend_radius] good: Every cable exit shows strain relief geometry (clamp, grommet, tie point) and routing respects a stated minimum bend radius away from moving joints and sharp edges
[connector_accessibility_and_keying] good: Connectors are reachable without disassembling structure, have finger/tool clearance, and mention keying or labeling to prevent mis-mating

verify.rule: budget
replaceable_module_path
connector_accessibility_and_keying
access_not_just_text
harness_strain_relief_and_bend_radius

risk.mit: Ensure precise alignment tools and clear assembly instructions.

risk.desc: Limited service access may hinder maintenance.
risk.mit: Increase access panel size or add additional access points.

risk.desc: Risk of electrical short due to harness routing.
risk.mit: Implement stricter harness routing guidelines and inspections.

risk.desc: Potential for strain relief failure due to inadequate support.
risk.mit: Enhance strain relief design and conduct stress tests.
